hero.description: Let your AI Agent securely command remote machines through NAT — no inbound ports, no complex setup.

items.title: Outbound-only
items.description: Workers connect out to the Master. No public IPs or firewall rules needed.

items.title: Network-friendly
items.description: Standard HTTPS/443 + SSE. Works in restricted environments.

items.title: Agent-ready
items.description: Built for Claude Code, Codex and other AI agents. CLI + skill integration.

items.title: Minimal trust
items.description: Master only relays. Workers execute in bounded workspaces.

items.title: Host or container
items.description: Run tasks natively or inside Docker isolation per worker.

items.title: Multi-user
items.description: Per-user tokens and node ownership. One Master, many teams.

steps.title: Client
steps.description: Your Agent calls CapOwn via CLI or skill.

steps.title: Master
steps.description: Relay handles routing, identity, and task state.

steps.title: Worker
steps.description: Remote device executes inside configured bounds.
